zh.lifeSummary: 當Louis de Bourbon於1437年出生在法國奧維時，他的父親Charles de Bourbon I36歲，母親Anne de Bourgogne33歲。他於1466年1月2日與Jeanne de VALOIS結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1482年8月30日在比利時利艾享年45歲，埋葬在比利時迪瑟 德 利艾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Louis de Bourbon于1437年出生在法国奧維时，他的父亲Charles de Bourbon I36岁，母亲Anne de Bourgogne33岁。他于1466年1月2日与Jeanne de VALOIS结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1482年8月30日在比利时利艾享年45岁，埋葬在比利时迪瑟 德 利艾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourbon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from a village in Allier, the site of the (now ruined) castle of Bourbon, or from another place called (Le) Bourbon, mainly in the southern part of France. The placename is derived from a Celtic and pre-Celtic element borb- denoting a hot spring.

History: The progenitor of a large part of the American bearers of the surname Bourbon was Jean-Pierre Bourbon from Salins-les-Bains in Jura, France, who settled in MO in the middle of the 19th century. However, many bearers of the surname claim a connection with the house of Bourbon, which provided generations of monarchs of France and Spain and other European royalty. It takes its name from the castle of Bourbon in Allier, which was held by Adhémar, a 9th-century noble. His descendant Beatrice, heiress of Bourbon, married Robert of Clermont, 6th son of King Louis IX of France, in 1272, and these two are considered founders of the royal house. Robert's son Louis was created Duke of Bourbon in 1327. By the 16th century they had added much of southern France, the dukedom of Vendôme, and the kingdom of Navarre to their fiefs, and in 1589 a Bourbon succeeded to the throne of France as Henry IV. His grandson, Louis XIV, called ‘the Sun King’, reigned 1643–1715, presiding over a golden age of French literature and art and attempting to establish French supremacy in Europe. The Bourbons ruled France until the Revolution in 1793 and again 1815–48. The present claimants to the French throne are descended from Louis XIV's brother, Philippe, Duke of Orléans. The Bourbons acquired the Spanish throne in 1700, when a grandson of Louis XIV succeeded as Philip V; they ruled until 1931 and were restored, in the person of King Juan Carlos, in 1975. The Bourbon kings of the Two Sicilies (i.e. Sicily and Naples), 1759–1861, and Bourbon dukes of Parma, 1748–1860, were descended from the Spanish branch of the family.

variants.name: Borbon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Ana, Jesus, Marta, Miguel Angel, Tomas, Ademar, Alfredo, Ana Maria, Bernabe, Berta, Carlos.

nameMeanings.name: Louis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hlōd ‘fame’ + wīg ‘war’. It was very common in French royal and noble families. Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

variants.name: Lewie
meanings: Anglicized spelling of   Louis  , or a pet form of   Lewis .

variants.name: Louie
meanings: Variant spelling of   Lewie   or   Louis  , currently in fashion.

variants.name: Lewi

Louis I ( 778–840 ) was the son of Charlemagne, who ruled as both King of France and Holy Roman Emperor. Altogether, the name was borne by sixteen kings of France up to the French Revolution, in which Louis XVI perished. Louis XIV, ‘the Sun King’ ( 1638–1715 ), reigned for seventy-two years ( 1643–1715 ), presiding in the middle part of his reign over a period of unparalleled French power and prosperity. In modern times Louis is also found in the English-speaking world (usually pronounced ‘loo-ee’). In Britain the Anglicized form Lewis is rather more common, whereas in America the reverse is true.

en.lifeSummary: When Louis de Bourbon was born in 1437, in Auvergne, France, his father, Charles de Bourbon I, was 36 and his mother, Anne de Bourgogne, was 33. He married Jeanne de VALOIS on 2 January 1466. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 30 August 1482, in Liège, Belgium, at the age of 45, and was buried in Liège, Belgium.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Louis de Bourbon est né en 1437, à Auvergne, France, son père, Charles de Bourbon I, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Anne de Bourgogne, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de VALOIS le 2 janvier 1466. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 30 août 1482, à Liège, Belgique, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Diocèse de Liège, Belgique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Louis de Bourbon 1437 in Auvergne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Charles de Bourbon I 36 und seine Mutter Anne de Bourgogne 33. Er hat am 2. Januar 1466 Jeanne de VALOIS geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 30. August 1482 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Lüttich, Belgien und wurde in Bistum Lüttich, Belgien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Louis de Bourbon è nato il nel 1437 nel Auvergne, Francia, il suo padre, Charles de Bourbon I, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Anne de Bourgogne, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de VALOIS il 2 gennaio 1466. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 30 agosto 1482, nel Liegi, Belgio, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Diocèse de Liège, Belgio.

ja.lifeSummary: Louis de Bourbonが1437年にフランスアウバーグンで生まれた時，父Charles de Bourbon Iは36歳，母Anne de Bourgogneは33歳であった。1466年1月2日にJeanne de VALOISと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1482年8月30日にベルギーリeッジで45歳で死去し，ベルギーディオクeゼ ド リeッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Louis de Bourbon(이)가 1437년 프랑스 오버그니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Charles de Bourbon I(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne de Bourgogne(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1466년 1월 2일 Jeanne de VALOIS(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1482년 8월 30일 벨기에 리e지에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 벨기에 디오ce스 데 리e지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Louis de Bourbon nasceu em 1437, em Auvergne, França, seu pai, Charles de Bourbon I, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Anne de Bourgogne, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de VALOIS em 2 de janeiro de 1466. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 30 de agosto de 1482, em Liège, Bélgica, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Diocèse de Liège, Bélgica.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Louis de Bourbon родился в 1437 г. в местности аувиргн, Франция, его отцу по имени Charles de Bourbon I было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne de Bourgogne, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de VALOIS 2 января 1466 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 30 августа 1482 г. в местности лиeдж, Бельгия в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности диокeс де лиeдж, Бельгия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Louis de Bourbon nació en 1437, en Auvergne, Francia, su papá, Charles de Bourbon I, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Anne de Bourgogne, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Jeanne de VALOIS el 2 de enero de 1466. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 30 de agosto de 1482, en Lieja, Bélgica, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Diocèse de Liège, Bélgica.
